title: Setup User Management routes and navigation
description:
Configure routing and navigation for user management pages.

Requirements:
- Add routes:
  - /users - Users list page (authenticated users)
  - /users/new - Create user page (admin only)
  - /users/:userId - User details page (authenticated users)
  - /users/:userId/edit - Edit user page (admin or own profile)

- Route guards:
  - Authenticated users only
  - Admin-only routes (create user)
  - Permission checks (edit user - must be admin or own profile)

- Navigation:
  - Add "Users" link to main navigation menu (admin only visible)
  - Add "My Profile" link to user dropdown menu (all authenticated users)
  - Breadcrumb navigation on user pages

- 404 handling:
  - User not found -> show 404 page
  - Permission denied -> show 403 page

Technical:
- Use React Router v6
- Protected route components
- useAuth hook for permission checks
- Redirect to login if not authenticated
- Redirect to forbidden if no permission

Files to modify:
- src/routes/index.tsx (or routes config file)
- src/components/Navigation/MainNav.tsx
- src/components/Navigation/UserMenu.tsx

Files to create:
- src/components/Routes/ProtectedRoute.tsx (if not exists)
- src/components/Routes/AdminRoute.tsx

title: Implement User Details page
description:
Create a detailed view page for individual user information.

Requirements:
- Display all user information:
  - Email (primary identifier)
  - Full name (Name + Surname)
  - Organization
  - Role with badge (admin/user)
  - Active status with indicator
  - Created date (formatted)
  - Last login date (formatted, or 'Never' if null)
- Action buttons (permission-based):
  - Edit button (admin or own profile)
  - Delete button (admin only, not yourself)
  - Activate/Deactivate toggle (admin only)
- Activity section:
  - Recent login history (if available from backend)
  - Created chaos scenarios count (if available)
- Breadcrumb navigation (Users > user@email.com)
- Back to users list button
- 404 page if user not found

API endpoint: GET /api/v1/users/:userId (needs to be implemented in backend)

Technical:
- Use React Router params to get userId
- Loading skeleton while fetching
- Error state (not found, permission denied)
- Responsive layout
- Auto-refresh on interval (optional, for last login)

Files to create:
- src/pages/Users/UserDetails.tsx
- src/components/Users/UserInfo.tsx
- src/components/Users/UserActivitySection.tsx

title: Fix login redirect loop causing infinite spinner
description:
After successful login, user was stuck in infinite redirect loop between / and /login causing continuous spinner and repeated isRegistered API calls.

Root cause: Login redirected to / which triggered RegistrationCheck, which then redirected back to /login, creating infinite loop.

Fix: 
- RegistrationCheck now checks if user is authenticated first and redirects to /app
- Login page default returnUrl changed from / to /app
- Prevents redirect loop for authenticated users

Commit: 2b1d322

title: Implement Create User form (admin only)
description:
Create a form for administrators to create new users.

Requirements:
- Form fields: Email, Password, Confirm Password, Name, Surname, Organization, Role (admin/user)
- Field validation:
  - Email: valid email format, not already registered
  - Password: minimum 8 characters, contains uppercase, lowercase, number
  - Confirm password: matches password
  - Name/Surname: required, non-empty
  - Role: required (admin/user)
- Show password strength indicator
- Toggle password visibility
- Role selector (dropdown or radio)
- Success message on user created
- Error handling for duplicate email, validation errors
- Only accessible by admin users (route guard)
- Cancel button to go back

API endpoint: POST /api/v1/users (needs to be implemented in backend)

Technical:
- Use React Hook Form for form management
- Client-side validation
- Server-side validation error display
- Redirect to user details after creation
- Toast notification on success/error

Files to create:
- src/pages/Users/CreateUser.tsx
- src/components/Users/UserForm.tsx
- src/utils/validation/userValidation.ts

title: Implement Delete User functionality (admin only)
description:
Allow admin users to delete user accounts.

Requirements:
- Delete button on user details page (admin only)
- Delete button in users table actions (admin only)
- Confirmation dialog:
  - Show user email and name
  - Warning message about permanent deletion
  - Require typing user email to confirm
  - Cannot delete yourself (prevent admin lockout)
  - Cannot delete last admin user (prevent system lockout)
- Success message after deletion
- Redirect to users list after deletion
- Error handling (user not found, permission denied)
- Show deleted user count in confirmation

API endpoint: DELETE /api/v1/users/:userId (needs to be implemented in backend)

Technical:
- Confirmation modal component
- Safety checks (prevent self-deletion, last admin)
- Optimistic UI update (remove from list immediately, rollback on error)
- Toast notification
- Loading state during deletion

Files to create:
- src/components/Users/DeleteUserConfirmation.tsx
- src/hooks/useDeleteUser.ts
notes: Delete functionality integrated in UserManagement with safety checks

title: Implement Users API client
description:
Create API client functions for user CRUD operations.

Requirements:
- Implement API functions:
  - listUsers(filters?: {role?: string, active?: boolean, search?: string}) - GET /api/v1/users
  - getUserById(userId: string) - GET /api/v1/users/:userId
  - createUser(userData: CreateUserRequest) - POST /api/v1/users
  - updateUser(userId: string, updates: UpdateUserRequest) - PATCH /api/v1/users/:userId
  - deleteUser(userId: string) - DELETE /api/v1/users/:userId
  - activateUser(userId: string) - PATCH /api/v1/users/:userId/activate
  - deactivateUser(userId: string) - PATCH /api/v1/users/:userId/deactivate

- TypeScript interfaces:
  - User (response model)
  - CreateUserRequest
  - UpdateUserRequest
  - UsersListResponse (with pagination)

- Authentication:
  - Include JWT token in Authorization header
  - Handle 401 (redirect to login)
  - Handle 403 (permission denied)

- Error handling:
  - Wrap API errors with custom error class
  - Map HTTP status codes to user-friendly messages
  - Network error handling

- Request/Response interceptors:
  - Add auth token automatically
  - Parse error responses
  - Log API calls (dev mode)

Technical:
- Use axios or fetch
- TypeScript for type safety
- Retry logic for failed requests (optional)
- Request cancellation support
- Mock API responses for development (optional)

Files to create:
- src/api/users.ts
- src/types/user.ts
- src/api/errors.ts (if not exists)

title: Implement Edit User page
description:
Create a page to edit existing user information.

Requirements:
- Pre-populate form with current user data
- Editable fields:
  - Name
  - Surname
  - Organization
  - Role (admin only can change roles)
  - Active status (admin only can activate/deactivate users)
- Password change section (optional):
  - Current password (if editing own account)
  - New password
  - Confirm new password
- Cannot edit email (read-only)
- Regular users can only edit their own profile
- Admin users can edit any user
- Show last login timestamp (read-only)
- Show created date (read-only)
- Save/Cancel buttons
- Confirmation dialog before deactivating user
- Success message on save
- Error handling

API endpoint: PATCH /api/v1/users/:userId (needs to be implemented in backend)

Technical:
- Reuse UserForm component from Create User
- Load user data on mount
- Handle permission checks (can edit own profile, admin can edit anyone)
- Optimistic updates with rollback on error
- Dirty form detection (warn on navigate away with unsaved changes)

Files to create:
- src/pages/Users/EditUser.tsx
- src/components/Users/PasswordChangeSection.tsx
- src/hooks/useUserPermissions.ts

title: User Management
description: I want that console implement the user management section. The admin user must be able to list/create/modify/delete/activate/deactivate users. The section must be located in the settings menu under the user settings.

title: Fix login redirect loop causing session expired warning
description:
Login flow had duplicate navigate() calls causing race condition:
- handleSubmit called navigate('/app') after login
- useEffect also called navigate('/app') when state changed
- This caused redirect loop showing 'Session Expired' warning

Fixed by removing navigate() from handleSubmit and letting only useEffect handle redirect.

Commit: 108bc63

title: Write tests for User Management features
description:
Create comprehensive tests for user management components and API.

Requirements:
- Component tests (React Testing Library):
  - UsersList.test.tsx - table rendering, filtering, sorting, pagination
  - UserForm.test.tsx - form validation, submission, error handling
  - CreateUser.test.tsx - admin-only access, successful creation
  - EditUser.test.tsx - loading user data, permission checks, updates
  - UserDetails.test.tsx - data display, action buttons visibility
  - DeleteUserConfirmation.test.tsx - confirmation flow, safety checks

- API client tests:
  - users.test.ts - all API functions (mock HTTP requests)
  - Test success responses
  - Test error responses (404, 401, 403, 500)
  - Test request payloads
  - Test authentication headers

- Integration tests:
  - Full user creation flow (form -> API -> success)
  - Full user edit flow (load -> edit -> save -> success)
  - Permission-based UI (admin sees delete, user doesn't)
  - Error handling (network failure, validation errors)

- Route tests:
  - Protected routes redirect to login
  - Admin routes deny regular users
  - 404 for non-existent users

Test coverage target: >70% (as per PROJECT.toml)

Technical:
- Use React Testing Library
- Use MSW (Mock Service Worker) for API mocking
- Jest for test runner
- Test user interactions, not implementation details
- Test accessibility (screen readers, keyboard navigation)

Files to create:
- src/pages/Users/__tests__/UsersList.test.tsx
- src/pages/Users/__tests__/CreateUser.test.tsx
- src/pages/Users/__tests__/EditUser.test.tsx
- src/pages/Users/__tests__/UserDetails.test.tsx
- src/api/__tests__/users.test.ts
- src/components/Users/__tests__/UserForm.test.tsx
- src/components/Users/__tests__/DeleteUserConfirmation.test.tsx
